homepage.modal_test_description: Make sure to take the test?
homepage.welcome: The Best Online Course You'll Find
homepage.description: For anyone starting out as a data analyst, this is a great introduction and is very inspiring. The content was well paced and was accessible to people just starting out. I liked the variety of the assignments present in the program.
homepage.footer1: 77% of learners report career benefits, such as new skills, increased pay, and new job opportunities.

learning.description: We used many illustrations, and were conscious of explaining in easy-to-understand language and using concrete examples as much as possible.I would be happy if everyone's understanding could be further improved.

learning.guide_intro: Welcome to the course! Below is a guide to completing the lessons and exams.
learning.video_completion_rule: To mark a video lesson as complete, you need to watch at least 90% of the video duration.
learning.video_completion_indicator: Your viewing progress will be saved automatically.
learning.pdf_completion_rule: To mark a PDF lesson as complete, you need to scroll at least 90% of the document.
learning.pdf_completion_indicator: The system will automatically record when you have read the entire document.
learning.exam_description: Each course has a final exam to assess your knowledge. You need to achieve the minimum required score to complete the course.
learning.exam_attempts: The number of attempts will be limited depending on each exam.
learning.progress_saved: Your learning progress will be saved automatically.
learning.complete_all: To complete the course, you need to finish all lessons.
learning.certificate: A certificate will be issued after you complete the entire course.
learning.download_not_available: This document is not available for download.
learning.exam_not_available_yet: The exam is not yet available

instruction_modal.title: Text question composition structure
instruction_modal.rule_1: Each question is separated by 1 or more new lines.
instruction_modal.rule_2: The correct answer is marked with a * in front.
instruction_modal.rule_3: Each question can have a maximum of 16 answer choices.
instruction_modal.rule_4: If the question structure is incorrect, the system will report an error and the question will not be displayed.
instruction_modal.examples_title: Examples and detailed instructions for each question yype:
instruction_modal.example_1_single: Which of the following programming languages is a compiled language?
instruction_modal.example_2_single: Which protocol is used to transfer email?
instruction_modal.example_1_multiple: Which of the following components are required in a computer system?
instruction_modal.example_2_multiple: Which of the following programming languages are commonly used to develop web applications?
instruction_modal.copy_structure_instruction: Copy the text structure above and paste it into the composition section to preview the question!
